title: White Lamps
description: Makes redstone lamps look like black and white pixels, useful for logical redstone.
body:
# Description

## This Covers All The Things This Pack Adds

## Textures
Makes **redstone lamps** look black while off, and white while on.
Makes **trapped doors** look like lamps, on is open, off is closed,
Makes **copper bulbs** look black while off and white while on, Also gives them an **outline** to show if they are **powered**.
Useful for **logical redstone**.
See gallery for pictures.

## Links
[Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxkKb2kAun2lXLBA-ieFPhA)  
[Source Code](https://github.com/ComputerGuy-github/White-Lamps)  
[Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WSn0QVQJjKU)

### Other
Will add more versions and other stuff soon!  
Thanks for 250k downloads!
